A.rationale: Corrects premise clearly, clean op-vs-complexity table, valid CPython link, dict/set suggestion; useful closing question, slightly longer than needed.

B.rationale: Correct and richest table, but longest answer and the demo snippet has an unbalanced paren typo, lowering precision and conciseness.

C.rationale: Correct, adds genuinely useful bisect O(log n) and names the O(n^2)-in-loop pitfall; slightly more framing padding than tightest answers.

D.rationale: Tightest complete answer: corrects premise, distinguishes positional vs value lookup, cites CPython source and docs, recommends dict/set. No filler.

notes: All four correct and safe. D wins on signal-per-token: complete, sourced, no padding. A close second. B docked for length plus a paren typo in its demo; C solid but slightly padded.
